nasb.text: ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Enough, you princes of Israel; put away violence and destruction, and practice justice and righteousness. Stop your expropriations from My people,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: Enough, O princes of Israel! Put away violence and oppression, and execute justice and righteousness. Cease your evictions of my people, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：“以色列的君王啊！你們所作的該夠了吧。你們要除掉強暴和毀滅的事，施行公平和公義。不要再掠奪我子民的產業。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: “‘主耶和华说，你们这些以色列的君王啊，够了！你们应当放弃暴行和抢掠，按公平和正义行事，不要再向我的子民横征暴敛了！这是主耶和华说的。
